landing.hero_title: Your life. Your choices. Your future.
landing.hero_subtitle: Anonymous support for relationships, health, and life decisions. A safe space built for you.
landing.how_subtitle: Simple, secure, and designed with your privacy in mind.
landing.step1_desc: No names, no tracking. Your identity is completely hidden from the moment you start typing.
landing.step2_desc: Receive reliable, judgment-free guidance from verified medical and counseling professionals.
landing.step3_desc: Use accurate, culturally relevant information to make the best decisions for your future.
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to navigate life's big questions.
landing.anonymous_qa_desc: A safe space to ask anything without fear of judgment or exposure.
landing.built_for_desc: Designed with deep respect for local culture, prioritizing your privacy, safety, and well-being above all else.

login.subtitle: We use secure sign-in, but your identity stays anonymous.
login.trust_1: We do NOT store your name or email
login.trust_2: You will be anonymous inside the app
login.footer: We only use Google to verify you are real. You will not be identified.

onboarding.choose_language: Choose your preferred language to get started.
onboarding.privacy_desc: No one will know who you are. You are safe here.

safely.title: You're In — Safely
safely.subtitle: You're now anonymous. No one knows who you are.

dashboard.greeting: How can we help you today?
dashboard.greeting_sub: We're here to support you with private, trustworthy information and guidance.
dashboard.action_pressure: I feel pressure in a relationship
dashboard.consent_desc: A simple guide to healthy communication and boundaries in relationships.
dashboard.contraception_desc: An overview of different methods available to you and how they work.
dashboard.selfcare_desc: Take a moment to assess your emotional well-being today.

chat.welcome_msg: Hi there. I'm Nuru, your safe space to ask anything about your body, relationships, or health. What's on your mind today?
chat.error_msg: I'm having trouble connecting. Please try again.

explore.title: Explore & Learn
explore.subtitle: Bite-sized knowledge for a healthier you.
explore.relationships_desc: Understanding boundaries, communication, and mutual respect in all types of relationships.
explore.body_desc: Essential knowledge about physical well-being and personal care.
explore.myths_desc: Busting common misconceptions with reliable, medically-backed facts.
explore.goals_desc: Tools and strategies for setting and achieving your personal ambitions.
explore.quiz_desc: Take a quick quiz to see what you've learned today.

settings.title: Privacy & Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your app preferences and control how your data is handled.
settings.safe_desc: Interactions with Nuru are strictly confidential. We do not link your conversations, searches, or clinic visits to your personal identity.
settings.anonymous_notice: You are anonymous in this app
settings.save_history_desc: Keep a local record of your chats to review later.
settings.delete_data_desc: Instantly wipe all data and return to the welcome screen.
settings.language_desc: Choose the language you prefer. Nuru will adapt its responses.
settings.logout_desc: Sign out and return to the welcome page.

decision.intro_desc: We'll ask a few private questions to help guide you. Everything stays anonymous.
decision.what_next: What would you like to do next?

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with the Nuru team. We're here to help.

common.copyright: © 2024 Nuru. Trusted companion for Ethiopian youth.
